data.name: BDSM Sex - Episode 8
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series featuring animations about a young woman exploring the world of BDSM. In this episode, Katy is marked and claimed by her dominants.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Episode Eight begins with Katy confined in a metallic cage, seemingly contemplating her new role.
Her Master and Mistress take this opportunity to exert their authority, using her as they please.
As the trio delves deeper into the world of BDSM, the dominants decide to permanently mark Katy, claiming her as their own.
With fresh tattoos and piercings, the young woman submits to various devices that bring her submission to new heights.
We promise a story with arousing dialogue, realistic-looking characters, and high-definition graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
